Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 10 25 25}The dark days of testing are finally over! The sun is shinin' bright![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You are not gonna believe this! I aced P.E.![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Well, that pretty much answers my question.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Whatever, a real man doesn't dwell on the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}I'm already thinking ahead to the blue skies of Yakushima![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Oh yeah, that's coming up soon, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Yeah, I guess I should start getting ready, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Why am I not surprised? If it makes you feel any better, I'm not ready either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Oh, sorry. I don't sound very enthusiastic, do I?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Hey, how about we stop somewhere on the way back? I don't have practice today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If you need to buy a swimsuit, I'd be happy to help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}All right, gimme a sec. I'm gonna go grab my stuff from the locker room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I know I've been kind of a dick lately...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Let's put this whole thing behind us. Cool?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Dude! I'm tryin' to be serious, here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Let's just put this whole thing behind us. Cool?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}I forgot that's the kind of guy you were. Well, not that I'm complaining.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}Let's put this whole thing behind us. Cool?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Alright, let's get outta here.[n]{f 1 1}
